Vecells · CONTRACTS

Integration Contract Cockpit

A calm internal contract room where proof, ambiguity, degraded continuity, and manual fallback stay structurally distinct for every external dependency.

Assumption ledger
Proof objects, freshness, blocker posture, and visible chips all come from one shared row model.

Fallback ladder
Proof -> Ambiguity -> Degraded -> Manual Fallback
Table parity
Diagram parity stays textual so runtime, support, and assurance read the same fallback law.
Stage Runtime meaning UI posture
Conflict register strip
Open rows are the only legal place for live-provider overrides to change adapter-facing details.
